Petition To Compel Interim Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-21-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Baer for Raymond Fong (Petitioner). Henry Wykowski for the Trustees.

The parties presented oral argument on the issue of the Trustees having authority to hold assets and/or refuse distribution. Mr. Wykowski stated that they had spoken to a mediator, and that they needed to pick a date. The matter was taken under submission. The matter was added to the calendar on March 26, 2008 for status on mediation.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR #11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

Petition To Compel Interim Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-14-2007 Continued To Dec-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: David Baer appearing for petitioner Raymond Fong. Henry Wykowski appearing for trustee/respondent/petitioner. Mr. Wykowski complainted about the discovery taking too long. He wanted the Court to set a trial date and order no distribution. Mr. Baer is ready to proceed with the matter on distribution from the trust. Trial will take 4 to 5 days. Matter is referred to the Presiding Judge to set for trial. Order signed. The status on distribution is continued to 12/19. Further briefing is not required. Mr. Wykowski would like to respond to Mr. Baer's reply filed last Friday.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Stella Obi.

Petitionfers' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With With Prior Production Order; Request For Issue Sanctions; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-31-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner Cary Fong's motion to compel compliance with the prior order is granted in part. As the Court previously found that the diary entries regarding the subject property were not communications and therefore not privileged, respondent is ordered to provide un-redacted diary entries except for those entries that describe communications between respondent and any attorney. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. Respondent shall provide the un-redacted records within 10 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. Petition To Compel Distribution And Accountings
Off Calendar Jan-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: David Baer appearing for petitioner Raymond Fong, Jr.. Henry Wykowski appearing for trustees/respondents. The accounting is not an issue at this time. The only issue is for preliminary distribution. Both counsel agreed to mediation. They have selected a mediator. Court wants the trustee to loan the petitioner $100,000.00 with no interest for the first six months. Order is without prejudice to the petitioner to request for further distribution. Court is setting this matter on the calendar on 4/4/07 for status or order to approve settlement. Mr. Baer will prepare an order and send it to Mr. Wykowski for approval as to form.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petn. For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Continued To Feb-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Wykowski (Counsel for Kerry Fong and Kelly Fong, Co-Trustees); David Baer (Counsel for Raymond Fong, Jr., Objector).

Counsel discussed the need for an informal accounting and the want of a timely distribution, noting that the parties were amenable to mediation and had taken steps in that direction. Counsel also felt that some form of distribution might be had. The Court continued the matter (Petition to compel distribution and accounting) to January 3, 2007 for status of the resolution of the distribution issue and continued the Petition Confirming Trust assets to February 21, 2007 for status of the mediation with respect to this issue.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.

Petition To Compel Distribution And Accountings
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Continued To Jan-03-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petn. For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Continued To Dec-20-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petn. For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-14-2006 Continued To Nov-20-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
